title: 9 fixes — Login offline, Agora timeout, FCM token leak, push dedup
notes: FIX: Login/signup button no longer stuck on 'Please wait...' if you're offline or the network drops mid-request (was requiring full app reload).
FIX: Agora token fetch now has 15s timeout — outgoing calls no longer hang on 'Connecting...' indefinitely when the API is slow.
PRIVACY FIX: Your FCM push token is now cleared on sign-out — the next user signing in on the same device won't receive your push notifications anymore.
FIX: Push notification listener was being added on every hourly token refresh — caused notification sound to fire 2x/3x/4x after long sessions. Now properly deduped.
PERF: Notifications realtime channel was rebuilding every ~1 hour on token refresh (and missing notifications during the rebuild window). Now stable across token refreshes.
FIX: Password Reset email button + Password Change button both no longer stuck on 'Sending.../Changing...' if the network drops.
POLISH: 2 typing-sound timers now properly cleared on screen exit (no more stray key-click on the next screen).
